sources.name: Voeten — United Nations General Assembly Voting Data
sources.note: UK roll-call vote agreement with each UN member state, averaged over the most recent 5 calendar years available. Cite Bailey, Strezhnev & Voeten (2017), 'Estimating Dynamic State Preferences from United Nations Voting Data', Journal of Conflict Resolution 61(2): 430-456.

snapshot.alignmentUnit: % of roll-call votes the UK and counterpart cast the same way

countries.description: UK vote-agreement % with each UN member state, mean across UNGA roll-call votes 2020-2024.
